title: Major UX Iteration and UI Platform Upgrade
notes: Added a dedicated website changelog tab with styled release cards rendered from changelog.json.
Added live recent-push visibility on the website by loading latest commits from the GitHub API.
Refined launcher UI organization with grouped sections, clearer status feedback, and better field styling.
Added runtime log quality-of-life features and stronger inline validation feedback.
Improved clicker/config robustness with safer worker shutdown, crash-safe click release handling, and atomic config saves.
Included test coverage for direction-vector mapping and config manager load/save coercion behavior.
Fixed taskbar visibility reliability so the launcher stays visible while open.
Migrated the desktop UI layer from Tkinter to PySide6 for improved flexibility and long-term cross-platform compatibility.
Added first-run onboarding, startup animation controls, light/dark themes, system tray restore/quit behavior, and upgraded hotkey capture with combo support.
Rebuilt the full launcher shell in Qt with custom borderless title bar, unified tab rendering, inline validation, startup animation, onboarding, and theme support.
Retained existing clicker/config core logic while preserving global hotkey toggle behavior and tray-based minimize/restore flow.

title: Initial Public Release
notes: Shipped configurable AFK combat automation with timed auto-eat behavior.
Added 3x3 look-direction picker and customizable hotkey with F8 fallback.
Published portable EXE, setup installer, and SHA-256 checksums.
